title: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Meaux
summary: The Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Meaux (CAPM) is a communauté d'agglomération in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. The 4 communes of the former Communauté de communes des Monts de la Goële were merged into it on 1 January 2017. On 31 December 2019 it was expanded with 4 communes from the former communauté de communes du Pays Créçois. Its area is 214.4 km2. Its population was 106,448 in 2018, of which 55,416 in Meaux.
text:
The Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Meaux (CAPM) is a communauté d'agglomération in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. The 4 communes of the former Communauté de communes des Monts de la Goële were merged into it on 1 January 2017. On 31 December 2019 it was expanded with 4 communes from the former communauté de communes du Pays Créçois. Its area is 214.4 km2. Its population was 106,448 in 2018, of which 55,416 in Meaux.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 26 communes:
